006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.nio.charset.*;
024import java.nio.file.*;
025import java.time.*;
026import java.util.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.bean.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.time.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.config.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.http.Path;
036import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.response.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans.*;
040import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter.*;
041import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
042
043/**
044 * REST resource for viewing and accessing log files.
045 */
046@Rest(
047   path="/logs",
048   title="Log files",
049   description="Log files from this service",
050   allowedMethodParams="*"
051)
052@HtmlConfig(uriAnchorText="PROPERTY_NAME")
053@SuppressWarnings({
054   "resource" // Streams and parsers returned to servlet container or caller; lifecycle managed externally
055})
056public class LogsResource extends BasicRestServlet {
057
058   /** File action link. */
059   @Response(schema = @Schema(description = "File action"))
060   public static class Action extends LinkString {
061
062      /**
063       * Constructor.
064       *
065       * @param name Action name.
066       * @param uri Action URI.
067       * @param uriArgs URI format arguments.
068       */
069      public Action(String name, String uri, Object...uriArgs) {
070         super(name, uri, uriArgs);
071      }
072
073      /** {@inheritDoc} */
074      @Override /* Overridden from LinkString */
075      public Action setName(String value) {
076         super.setName(value);
077         return this;
078      }
079
080      /** {@inheritDoc} */
081      @Override /* Overridden from LinkString */
082      public Action setUri(java.net.URI value) {
083         super.setUri(value);
084         return this;
085      }
086
087      /** {@inheritDoc} */
088      @Override /* Overridden from LinkString */
089      public Action setUri(String value) {
090         super.setUri(value);
091         return this;
092      }
093
094      /** {@inheritDoc} */
095      @Override /* Overridden from LinkString */
096      public Action setUri(String value, Object...args) {
097         super.setUri(value, args);
098         return this;
099      }
100   }
101
102   /** File or directory details for REST response. */
103   @Response(schema = @Schema(description = "File or directory details"))
104   @BeanType(properties = "type,name,size,lastModified,actions,files")
105   public static class FileResource {
106      static final FileFilter FILE_FILTER = f2 -> f2.isDirectory() || f2.getName().endsWith(".log");
107      static final Comparator<FileResource> FILE_COMPARATOR = (o1, o2) -> {
108         int c = o1.getType().compareTo(o2.getType());
109         return c != 0 ? c : o1.getName().compareTo(o2.getName());
110      };
111      private final File f;
112      private final String path;
113
114      private final String uri;
115
116      private final boolean includeChildren;
117      private final boolean allowDeletes;
118
119      /**
120       * Constructor.
121       *
122       * @param f The file or directory.
123       * @param path The path.
124       * @param allowDeletes Whether deletes are allowed.
125       * @param includeChildren Whether to include child files.
126       */
127      public FileResource(File f, String path, boolean allowDeletes, boolean includeChildren) {
128         this.f = f;
129         this.path = path;
130         this.uri = "servlet:/" + (path == null ? "" : path);
131         this.includeChildren = includeChildren;
132         this.allowDeletes = allowDeletes;
133      }
134
135      /**
136       * Returns available actions for this file (view, download, delete, etc.).
137       *
138       * @return The list of actions.
139       */
140      @Html(format = HtmlFormat.HTML_CDC)
141      public List<Action> getActions() {
142         var l = new ArrayList<Action>();
143         if (f.canRead() && ! f.isDirectory()) {
144            l.add(new Action("view", uri + "?method=VIEW"));
145            l.add(new Action("highlighted", uri + "?method=VIEW&highlight=true"));
146            l.add(new Action("parsed", uri + "?method=PARSE"));
147            l.add(new Action("download", uri + "?method=DOWNLOAD"));
148            if (allowDeletes)
149               l.add(new Action("delete", uri + "?method=DELETE"));
150         }
151         return l;
152      }
153
154      /**
155       * Returns child files when this is a directory and includeChildren is true.
156       *
157       * @return Child files, or <jk>null</jk> when this is a file or includeChildren is false.
158       */
159      @SuppressWarnings({
160         "java:S1168"     // Intentional null when file or !includeChildren.
161      })
162      public Set<FileResource> getFiles() {
163         if (f.isFile() || ! includeChildren)
164            return null;
165         var s = new TreeSet<>(FILE_COMPARATOR);
166         for (var fc : f.listFiles(FILE_FILTER))
167            s.add(new FileResource(fc, (nn(path) ? (path + '/') : "") + urlEncode(fc.getName()), allowDeletes, false));
168         return s;
169      }
170
171      /**
172       * Returns the last modified date of the file.
173       *
174       * @return The last modified date as an {@link Instant}.
175       */
176      public Instant getLastModified() { return Instant.ofEpochMilli(f.lastModified()); }
177
178      /**
179       * Returns the file name as a link.
180       *
181       * @return The name as a link.
182       */
183      public LinkString getName() { return new LinkString(f.getName(), uri); }
184
185      /**
186       * Returns the file size, or number of items for directories.
187       *
188       * @return The size.
189       */
190      public long getSize() { return f.isDirectory() ? f.listFiles().length : f.length(); }
191
192      /**
193       * Returns the type: "dir" or "file".
194       *
195       * @return The type.
196       */
197      public String getType() { return (f.isDirectory() ? "dir" : "file"); }
198   }
199
200   @Response(schema = @Schema(type = "string", format = "binary", description = "Contents of file"))
201   static class FileContents extends FileInputStream {
202
203      /**
204       * Constructor.
205       *
206       * @param file The file to read.
207       * @throws FileNotFoundException If the file is not found.
208       */
209      public FileContents(File file) throws FileNotFoundException {
210         super(file);
211      }
212   }
213
214   @Response(schema = @Schema(description = "Redirect to root page on success"))
215   static class RedirectToRoot extends SeeOtherRoot {}
216
217   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
218
219   private static BufferedReader getReader(File f) throws IOException {
220      return new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(new FileInputStream(f), Charset.defaultCharset()));
221   }
222
223   /** Log directory path. Set once in @RestInit, shared by all requests. */
224   private static File logDir;
225
226   /** Log entry formatter. Set once in @RestInit, shared by all requests. */
227   private static LogEntryFormatter leFormatter;
228
229   /** Whether deletes are allowed. Set once in @RestInit, shared by all requests. */
230   private static boolean allowDeletes;
231
232   /**
233    * Deletes a log file on the file system.
234    *
235    * @param path The file path.
236    * @return Redirect to root on success.
237    * @throws MethodNotAllowed If deletes are not enabled.
238    */
239   @RestDelete(
240      path="/*",
241      summary="Delete log file",
242      description="Delete a log file on the file system."
243   )
244   public RedirectToRoot deleteFile(@Path("/*") String path) throws MethodNotAllowed {
245      deleteFile(getFile(path));
246      return new RedirectToRoot();
247   }
248   /**
249    * Downloads the contents of a file.
250    *
251    * @param res The response.
252    * @param path The file path.
253    * @return The file contents stream.
254    * @throws NotFound If the file is not found.
255    * @throws MethodNotAllowed If method not allowed.
256    */
257   @RestOp(
258      method="DOWNLOAD",
259      path="/*",
260      summary="Download file",
261      description="Download the contents of a file.\nContent-Type is set to 'application/octet-stream'."
262   )
263   public FileContents downloadFile(RestResponse res, @Path("/*") String path) throws NotFound, MethodNotAllowed {
264      res.setContentType("application/octet-stream");
265      try {
266         return new FileContents(getFile(path));
267      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") FileNotFoundException e) {
268         throw new NotFound("File not found");
269      }
270   }
271
272   /**
273    * Returns information about the specified file or directory.
274    *
275    * @param req The request.
276    * @param path The file path.
277    * @return The file or directory details.
278    * @throws NotFound If the file is not found.
279    * @throws Exception If an error occurs.
280    */
281   @RestGet(
282      path="/*",
283      summary="View information on file or directory",
284      description="Returns information about the specified file or directory."
285   )
286   @HtmlDocConfig(
287      nav={"<h5>Folder:  $RA{fullPath}</h5>"}
288   )
289   @SuppressWarnings({
290      "java:S112" // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method
291   })
292   public FileResource getFile(RestRequest req, @Path("/*") String path) throws NotFound, Exception {
293
294      var dir = getFile(path);
295      req.setAttribute("fullPath", dir.getAbsolutePath());
296
297      return new FileResource(dir, path, allowDeletes, true);
298   }
299
300   /**
301    * Initializes log directory and formatter from config.
302    *
303    * @param config The microservice configuration.
304    */
305   @RestInit
306   @SuppressWarnings({
307      "java:S2696" // RestInit must be instance method; static fields shared across requests by design
308   })
309   public void init(Config config) {
310      logDir = new File(config.get("Logging/logDir").asString().orElse("logs"));
311      allowDeletes = config.get("Logging/allowDeletes").asBoolean().orElse(true);
312      leFormatter = new LogEntryFormatter(
313         config.get("Logging/format").asString().orElse("[{date} {level}] {msg}%n"),
314         config.get("Logging/dateFormat").asString().orElse("yyyy.MM.dd hh:mm:ss"),
315         config.get("Logging/useStackTraceHashes").asBoolean().orElse(true)
316      );
317   }
318
319   /**
320    * Views the contents of a log file with optional filtering.
321    *
322    * @param res The response.
323    * @param path The file path.
324    * @param highlight Add severity color highlighting.
325    * @param start Start timestamp filter.
326    * @param end End timestamp filter.
327    * @param thread Thread name filter.
328    * @param loggers Logger filter.
329    * @param severity Severity filter.
330    * @throws NotFound If the file is not found.
331    * @throws MethodNotAllowed If method not allowed.
332    * @throws IOException If an I/O error occurs.
333    */
334   @RestOp(
335      method="VIEW",
336      path="/*",
337      summary="View contents of log file",
338      description="View the contents of a log file."
339   )
340   @SuppressWarnings({
341      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
342      "java:S107" // Method has many parameters; acceptable for builder/configuration methods
343   })
344   public void viewFile(
345         RestResponse res,
346         @Path("/*") String path,
347         @Query(name="highlight", schema=@Schema(d="Add severity color highlighting.")) boolean highlight,
348         @Query(name="start", schema=@Schema(d="Start timestamp (ISO8601, full or partial).\nDon't print lines logged before the specified timestamp.\nUse any of the following formats: yyyy, yyyy-MM, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-ddThh, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSS")) String start,
349         @Query(name="end", schema=@Schema(d="End timestamp (ISO8601, full or partial).\nDon't print lines logged after the specified timestamp.\nUse any of the following formats: yyyy, yyyy-MM, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-ddThh, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSS")) String end,
350         @Query(name="thread", schema=@Schema(d="Thread name filter.\nOnly show log entries with the specified thread name.")) String thread,
351         @Query(name="loggers", schema=@Schema(d="Logger filter (simple class name).\nOnly show log entries if they were produced by one of the specified loggers.")) String[] loggers,
352         @Query(name="severity",schema=@Schema( d="Severity filter.\nOnly show log entries with the specified severity.")) String[] severity
353      ) throws NotFound, MethodNotAllowed, IOException {
354
355      var f = getFile(path);
356
357      var startDate = o(start).filter(x1 -> ! isBlank(x1)).map(x2 -> GranularZonedDateTime.of(start).getZonedDateTime()).map(GregorianCalendar::from).map(Calendar::getTime).orElse(null);
358      var endDate = o(end).filter(x11 -> ! isBlank(x11)).map(x4 -> GranularZonedDateTime.of(end).getZonedDateTime()).map(GregorianCalendar::from).map(Calendar::getTime).orElse(null);
359
360      if (! highlight) {
361         var o = getReader(f, startDate, endDate, thread, loggers, severity);
362         res.setContentType("text/plain");
363         if (o instanceof Reader)
364            res.setContent(o);
365         else {
366            try (var p = (LogParser)o; Writer w = res.getNegotiatedWriter()) {
367               p.writeTo(w);
368            }
369         }
370         return;
371      }
372
373      res.setContentType("text/html");
374      try (var w = res.getNegotiatedWriter()) {
375         w.println("<html><body style='font-family:monospace;font-size:8pt;white-space:pre;'>");
376         try (var lp = getLogParser(f, startDate, endDate, thread, loggers, severity)) {
377            if (! lp.hasNext())
378               w.append("<span style='color:gray'>[EMPTY]</span>");
379            else
380               for (var le : lp) {
381                  var s = le.severity.charAt(0);
382                  String color = "black";
383                  //SEVERE|WARNING|INFO|CONFIG|FINE|FINER|FINEST
384                  if (s == 'I')
385                     color = "#006400";
386                  else if (s == 'W')
387                     color = "#CC8400";
388                  else if (s == 'E' || s == 'S')
389                     color = "#DD0000";
390                  else if (s == 'D' || s == 'F' || s == 'T')
391                     color = "#000064";
392                  w.append("<span style='color:").append(color).append("'>");
393                  le.appendHtml(w).append("</span>");
394               }
395            w.append("</body></html>");
396         }
397      }
398   }
399   /**
400    * Views the parsed contents of a log file with filtering.
401    *
402    * @param req The request.
403    * @param path The file path.
404    * @param start Start timestamp filter.
405    * @param end End timestamp filter.
406    * @param thread Thread name filter.
407    * @param loggers Logger filter.
408    * @param severity Severity filter.
409    * @return The log parser iterable.
410    * @throws NotFound If the file is not found.
411    * @throws IOException If an I/O error occurs.
412    */
413   @RestOp(
414      method="PARSE",
415      path="/*",
416      converters=Queryable.class,
417      summary="View parsed contents of file",
418      description="View the parsed contents of a file.",
419      swagger=@OpSwagger(
420         parameters={
421             Queryable.SWAGGER_PARAMS
422         }
423      )
424   )
425   @HtmlDocConfig(
426      nav={"<h5>Folder:  $RA{fullPath}</h5>"}
427   )
428   public LogParser viewParsedEntries(
429         RestRequest req,
430         @Path("/*") String path,
431         @Query(name="start", schema=@Schema(d="Start timestamp (ISO8601, full or partial).\nDon't print lines logged before the specified timestamp.\nUse any of the following formats: yyyy, yyyy-MM, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-ddThh, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSS")) String start,
432         @Query(name="end", schema=@Schema(d="End timestamp (ISO8601, full or partial).\nDon't print lines logged after the specified timestamp.\nUse any of the following formats: yyyy, yyyy-MM, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-ddThh, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSS")) String end,
433         @Query(name="thread", schema=@Schema(d="Thread name filter.\nOnly show log entries with the specified thread name.")) String thread,
434         @Query(name="loggers", schema=@Schema(d="Logger filter (simple class name).\nOnly show log entries if they were produced by one of the specified loggers.")) String[] loggers,
435         @Query(name="severity", schema=@Schema(d="Severity filter.\nOnly show log entries with the specified severity.")) String[] severity
436      ) throws NotFound, IOException {
437
438      var f = getFile(path);
439      req.setAttribute("fullPath", f.getAbsolutePath());
440
441      var startDate = o(start).filter(x1 -> ! isBlank(x1)).map(x2 -> GranularZonedDateTime.of(start).getZonedDateTime()).map(GregorianCalendar::from).map(Calendar::getTime).orElse(null);
442      var endDate = o(end).filter(x11 -> ! isBlank(x11)).map(x4 -> GranularZonedDateTime.of(end).getZonedDateTime()).map(GregorianCalendar::from).map(Calendar::getTime).orElse(null);
443
444      return getLogParser(f, startDate, endDate, thread, loggers, severity);
445   }
446
447   private void deleteFile(File f) {
448      if (! allowDeletes)
449         throw new MethodNotAllowed("DELETE not enabled");
450      if (f.isDirectory()) {
451         var files = f.listFiles();
452         if (nn(files)) {
453            for (var fc : files)
454               deleteFile(fc);
455         }
456      }
457      try {
458         Files.delete(f.toPath());
459      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") IOException e) {
460         throw new Forbidden("Could not delete file {0}", f.getAbsolutePath());
461      }
462   }
463
464   /**
465    * Resolves a request path against {@link #logDir} with a canonical-path boundary check
466    * so {@code ..} segments, absolute paths, and symlink-out cannot escape the configured root.
467    *
468    * <p>
469    * The check is intentionally applied at this single funnel because every public operation on
470    * this resource (view, parse, download, delete, info) resolves the user-supplied path through
471    * this method. Delegates to {@link FileUtils#resolveSafely(File, String)} — the canonical
472    * shared implementation; the caller-layer mapping is: boundary violation → 403 (Forbidden),
473    * non-existent target → 404 (NotFound).
474    */
475   private static File getFile(String path) throws NotFound {
476      try {
477         return FileUtils.resolveSafely(logDir, path)
478            .orElseThrow(() -> new NotFound("File not found."));
479      } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
480         throw new Forbidden(e.getMessage());
481      }
482   }
483
484   private static LogParser getLogParser(File f, Date start, Date end, String thread, String[] loggers, String[] severity) throws IOException {
485      return new LogParser(leFormatter, f, start, end, thread, loggers, severity);
486   }
487
488   private static Object getReader(File f, Date start, Date end, String thread, String[] loggers, String[] severity) throws IOException {
489      if (start == null && end == null && thread == null && loggers == null)
490         return getReader(f);
491      return getLogParser(f, start, end, thread, loggers, severity);
492   }
493}
